title: The Promise to Grow Stronger
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The small sky island of weatheria

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm very sorry for what I did...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As though we can trust that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Now, off to work!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Information ?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This world is certainly a big place!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Haredas- San! Teach me everything you know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...About the weather of the new world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You certainly are a hasty one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Well, of course I am!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I can't help it ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You can't...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He doesn't have any sense of danger!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Luffy ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: help me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Of course I will!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He always does the craziest things...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: this time, I will!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...Could they be used as a weapon?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wipe that grin off your face!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger.
